title: Al-Munqidh min al-Dalal: Deliverance from Error
description: Al-Ghazali's intellectual autobiography: how he lost faith through philosophy, regained it through Sufism.
introduction: Al-Ghazali's intellectual autobiography: how he lost faith through philosophy, regained it through Sufism.

translation.text: I examined myself and found that I was bound on all sides by these bonds of temptation. I was like a man standing on the edge of a crumbling bank.
